They, I gave them our logo.

But one thing that when it came to like, once I was in the room with them, once we're getting ready to welcome everyone, we had that cancellation.

Outside with me.

It was fine.

So you're kind of always going to get some of those cancellations.
One thing that worked really well, though, was I sent out an email.
I want to say two days before.
And I gave them all of the details.
I can actually pull it up so you can see it.
I gave them all of the details ahead of time and said, like, hey, we're really excited to host you.
This is like a very intimate experience.
If for any reason you can't attend, please let us know right.
Because that will affect, you know, the experience for everyone.
So you could kind of see what I did.
It was like, hey, looking forward to seeing you all there.
We're going to host, just giving them a little bit about what's going on.
Like, we're going to do a light cocktail reception.
And then after that, we'll sit down for dinner.
I sent them the attendee list so they could see, like, who else was going to be there.
This was, I think this was good to do for dinners.
I wouldn't do it for, like, a larger, like, if it's more than 20 people, I wouldn't do it.
But so you can kind of get a sense.
I sent this out.
did it in Notion.
